snippet.title: BTS "Butter" - The Late Show with Stephen Colbert
snippet.description:
Global pop icons BTS return to perform their record-smashing new hit, "Butter," ahead of their upcoming livestream event BTS 2021 MUSTER SOWOOZOO which takes place on June 13th and 14th. If you missed it, scroll back to watch RM, Jin, SUGA, j-hope, Jimin, V, and Jung Kook teach Stephen Colbert some new hand gestures in a hilarious Late Show comedy bit! #BTSonLSSC #Butter #BTS

Subscribe To "The Late Show" Channel: http://bit.ly/ColbertYouTube
Watch full episodes of "The Late Show": http://bit.ly/1Puei40
Like "The Late Show" on Facebook: http://on.fb.me/1df139Y
Follow "The Late Show" on Twitter: http://bit.ly/1dMzZzG
Follow "The Late Show" on Instagram: http://bit.ly/29wfREj

Watch The Late Show with Stephen Colbert weeknights at 11:35 PM ET/10:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

---
The Late Show with Stephen Colbert is the premier late night talk show on CBS, airing at 11:35pm EST, streaming online via Paramount+, and delivered to the International Space Station on a USB drive taped to a weather balloon. Every night, viewers can expect: Comedy, humor, funny moments, witty interviews, celebrities, famous people, movie stars, bits, humorous celebrities doing bits, funny celebs, big group photos of every star from Hollywood, even the reclusive ones, plus also jokes.

snippet.title: The Weeknd - The Weeknd ‚Äì Save Your Tears (Live on The 2021 Billboard Music Awards)
snippet.description:
‚ÄúSave Your Tears‚Äù (Live at The 2021 Billboard Music Awards) 

'After Hours' available everywhere now: http://theweeknd.co/afterhoursYD 

‚ñ∫Subscribe to The Weeknd on YouTube: http://theweeknd.co/subscribeYD 

‚ñ∫Get exclusive merch: shop.theweeknd.com 

‚ñ∫Follow The Weeknd:
https://twitter.com/theweeknd
https://www.facebook.com/theweeknd
https://www.instagram.com/theweeknd
https://www.theweeknd.com 

Directed by Alex Lill
Produced by Brendan Garrett
Production Company:  Bucket Pictures 

Lyrics:

Ooh
Na na, yeah
I saw you dancing in a crowded room
You look so happy when I'm not with you
But then you saw me, caught you by surprise
A single teardrop falling from your eye
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
You could've asked me why I broke your heart
You could've told me that you fell apart
But you walked past me like I wasn't there
And just pretended like you didn't care
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
So
I made you think that I would always stay
I said some things that I should never say
Yeah, I broke your heart like someone did to mine
And now you won't love me for a second time
I don't know why I run away, oh, girl
Said I make you cry when I run away
Girl, take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
I realize that I'm much too late
And you deserve someone better
Save your tears for another day (Ooh, yeah)
Save your tears for another day (Yeah)
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Save your tears for another day, ooh, girl (Ah)
I said save your tears for another day (Ah)
Save your tears for another day (Ah)
Save your tears for another day (Ah)

#TheWeeknd #SaveYourTears #AfterHours

http://vevo.ly/rVTlPK

Tanto en su capital T√≥rshavn como en los lugares m√°s despoblados nos encontramos con lugares incre√≠bles. Pero m√°s llamativo a√∫n es el trazado de t√∫neles submarinos que construyeron: son m√°s de 20 y hasta inauguraron una rotonda bajo el agua en 2020.

en.title: Faroe Islands, the most incredible archipelago on the map
en.description:
The Faroe Islands are an archipelago located in the North Atlantic, between Iceland and Norway. Although they depend on the Kingdom of Denmark, they have their own culture and identity.

Both in its capital T√≥rshavn and in the most unpopulated places we find incredible scenery. But even more striking is the route of underwater tunnels that they built: there are more than 20 and they even inaugurated an underwater roundabout in 2020.

In our video we also invite you to learn about the reasons for an unexpected cultural crossroads: why are there so many immigrants from the Philippines and Thailand?

üåé Un Mundo Inmenso
Singularities of our planet

‚úÖ Subscribe! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCdwdFOhBP9CoAOlHDTmTxaw?sub_confirmation=1

üåü Become a member! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCdwdFOhBP9CoAOlHDTmTxaw/join

snippet.title: AGUERO FAIRYTALE AT THE ETIHAD | Man City 5-0 Everton Highlights
snippet.description:
Sergio Aguero came off the bench to score twice as City thrashed Everton 5-0 as the champions ended the Premier League campaign in style.
Kevin De Bruyne started the rout in the first-half with Gabriel Jesus quickly adding another.

Phil Foden wrapped up the three points after the re-start before Aguero's magical cameo saw him score twice in five minutes.

Match Report can be read here: https://www.mancity.com/news/mens/manchester-city-v-everton-match-report-23-may-2021-63757377

#AnneMarie #NiallHoran #OurSong

About Anne-Marie:
Anne-Marie has proved to be one of the UK‚Äôs most exciting and successful British breakthrough pop stars of recent years. A former 3x world karate champion and West End child star-turned 9x BRIT Award nominee, A-M‚Äôs rise has been nothing short of meteoric. In 2018 Anne-Marie released her debut album, ‚ÄòSpeak Your Mind‚Äô which featured the hit singles 'Alarm', 'Ciao Adios', 'Heavy', 'Friends', '2002' and 'Perfect to Me'. She subsequently ended that year as the UK‚Äôs biggest-selling debut artist, selling out headline shows and playing stadium dates supporting long-time friend and champion Ed Sheeran in the process.

She has also sang on and co-written many other hits such as Birthday, Rockabye, Don't Leave Me Alone,  To Be Young, f*ck, i'm lonely and Don't Play, collaborating with the likes of Clean Bandit, Marshmello, David Guetta, Lauv, Rudimental, Doja Cat and KSI, as well as starring on The Greatest Showman: Reimagined soundtrack performing Rewrite the stars alongside James Arthur.

(LYRICS)
Verse
Hello, it‚Äôs me your ex
I called to say not sorry but I wish you the best 
And I don‚Äôt hold no grudges, promise this ain‚Äôt a test, We ok, we ok
 
Pre
Sometimes it works out but sometimes it don‚Äôt
Maybe we‚Äôll fix this or maybe we won‚Äôt 
Sometimes a heart can sink like a stone 
Until you find home 
 
Chorus
This ain‚Äôt a heartbreak anthem, I don‚Äôt care what happened but I ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it 
Don‚Äôt want to throw a tantrum, you did what you had to, no i ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it 
And I don‚Äôt wanna feel, I don‚Äôt wanna feel hollow
Chasing you and me, chasing all of these shadows
This ain‚Äôt a heartbreak anthem, I don‚Äôt care what happened, but I ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it.
 
Verse 2
Hello, it‚Äôs me your ex (again)
I didn‚Äôt want to call but there‚Äôs this pain in my chest
And thanks to you I‚Äôm wearing out this bulletproof vest but I‚Äôll be ok, I‚Äôm ok
 
Pre
Sometimes it works out but sometimes it don‚Äôt
Maybe we‚Äôll fix this or maybe we won‚Äôt 
Sometimes a heart can sink like a stone 
Until you find home 
 
Chorus
This ain‚Äôt a heartbreak anthem, I don‚Äôt care what happened but I ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it 
Don‚Äôt want to throw a tantrum, you did what you had to, no i ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it 
And I don‚Äôt wanna feel, I don‚Äôt wanna feel hollow
Chasing you and me, chasing all of these shadows
This ain‚Äôt a heartbreak anthem, I don‚Äôt care what happened, but I ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it.

snippet.title: Rochy RD x Mozart La Para - Voy Pa La Calle Hoy| Video Oficial
snippet.description:
VOY PA LA CALLE . ROCHYRD ‚ùå MOZART LA PARA .

Pa ‚Äò la calle vamos al üíØ hay que prenderla t√∫ sabe con to‚Äô lo hierro apagando Vela . (Eh) t√∫ no me llega te pongo a gastar la suela mojan si se est√° buscando ahora agr√©gale que suena .

                        CORO
Voy Pa ‚Äò la calle hoy en alta , no se cuando regreso , siento que ya hasta me hace falta me voy con pal‚Äô de peso . Voy Pa la calle hoy , voy pa‚Äô la calle hoy.... voy pa‚Äô la calle hoy ...(X2)

Pa‚Äô la calle voy normal siempre ando con pal de peso menol yo lo joceaba siempre estoy puesto Pa‚Äô eso nunca me detuvieron ni coro era travieso tamo activo en la Avenida Dando saco e‚Äô cabra (EL HUESO).

Toy burlao la humildad es que no se pierde careta Pa ‚Äò lo caretuse el que se quilla pierde rulin de verdad mezclo to‚Äô en el mismo vaso cuando toy‚Äô medio mariao empezamos a beber al paso pa‚Äô la calle son al üíØ hay que prenderla t√∫ sabe con to‚Äô lo hierro apagando vela , t√∫ no me llega te pongo a gastar la suela mojan si se ta buscando ahora agr√©gale que suena . 


                       MOZART 
Pa‚Äô la calle voy toy cansado de estar en la casa otra resaca pero en eso se me pasa de que vale tener pila de cuarto si usted no goza hay veces que uno manga pal‚Äô de peso y lo explota un flow nuevo un cerquillo es suficiente yo me quito y me pongo cuando vuelvo doy corriente yo soy de un barrio pero de un barrio caliente y a mi no me de muela que yo tengo mi Expediente.
Si el sol sale me acuesto la para dando la para pa‚Äô la calle yo estoy puesto la fila de los party m√≠o son como la del metro ven vakeame lo perro de los pies que estoy en retro .
    


                        (CORO )
Voy pa‚Äô calle hoy ...... , Voy pa‚Äô calle hoy ...... Voy pa‚Äô calle hoy ...... Voy pa‚Äô calle hoy ...... Voy pa‚Äô calle hoy ...... voy pa la calle hoy en alta no s√© cuando regreso siento que ya hasta me hace falta me voy con pal de peso , .. voy pa la calle hoy en alta no s√© cuando regreso siento que ya hasta me hace falta me voy con pal de peso

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don‚Äôt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team‚Äôs safe and try to crack open your opponents‚Äô. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you‚Äôre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!
